title: Moose UI
description: Moose UI overhauls the Minecraft GUI experience with custom containers, a handmade font, focused on elevating the vanilla experience.
body:
# You're Telling Me a Moose Made this UI?
Yes! I'm The Cosmic Moose and I indeed made this UI. This is the sister pack to my other resource pack Moose Blocks and extends my art style to the UI. I have redone every button, widget, container, and more. This pack has built in support for OptiGUI and Optifine (Optifine Untested). If you enjoy my packs, please join the discord server and give feedback so I can improve them! 
### Key Features
- Fully custom containers for every functional and storage block in the game.
- Colored Shulker Box Textures
- Mod Support
  - OptiGUI
  - Mod Menu
  - Appleskin
  - Easy Magic
  - Easy Anvils
  - Easy Shulker Boxes
  - Nemo's Sorting
  - Inventory Profiles Next
  - Traveler's Backpacks (partial support, full support in progress)
  - Support for more mods coming!

### My Other Packs:
- [Mooseblocks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mooseblocks)Block Texture Overhaul: Beta Release
- [Moose Items](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/moose-items) 3D Models for Items and Tools: Alpha Release
- [MooseGen](https://modrinth.com/datapack/moose-gen) World Generation Overhaul: Beta Release.
- Moose Mobs: In Development Release TBD
